text:
TheParis2024Olympicsmay have only just finished but already anticipation is building for the nextsummerGames.

There’s just 18 months to go before the next edition of theWinter Olympicswhich is being held in the Italian cities ofMilanand Cortina d’Ampezzo in 2026.

But if athletics, gymnastics, swimming, cycling and everything in between is more your thing then you’ve going to have to be a little patient.

So where and when will the next Olympics take place? And what about the Games after that? Here’s what you need to know:

The 2028 Olympic Games will be held inLos Angeles, California, in theUnited States of America.

The International Olympic Committee confirmedLA had won their bid to stage the Gamesback in September 2017, at the same time that 2024 Games were awarded to Paris.

Both cities had wanted to host the 2024 event, before LA agreed to wait an extra four years after the IOC made guarantees on funding.

It will be the fifth time that the summer Olympics have been held in the US and the third time in LA after 1932 and 1984. St. Louis and Atlanta played host in 1904 and 1996 respectively.

It will therefore make LA the third city to have hosted three Olympic games afterLondonand Paris.

The closing ceremony in Paris saw the official handover of the Games to the Californian city, witha little help from Tom Cruiseand Snoop Dog.

Up Next

To get the latest news from the capital, visit Metro'sLondon news hub.

Additionally, the hosts for the 2032 Games have also been decided:Brisbane, Australia.

The bidding process for 2036 is also underway, with Nusantara (Indonesia), Istanbul (Turkey) and Santiago (Chile) among those to have confirmed their bid.

The LA 2028 Games are set to take place earlier in the summer than usual, with thestart date currently slated as July 14, 2028, and is set to run for a little over two weeks before finishing on July 30.

Additionally, the 2028 Paralympics are scheduled to get underway on August 15 and finish on August 27.

title: Where will the next Olympics be held? 2028 and 2032 host cities | Metro News
description: Find out which cities are due to host the 2028 and 2032 Summer Olympic Games following recent hosts Paris, Tokyo, Rio de Janeiro and London.
